description_long: This kiosk features a robust, angular structure with a dark metallic exterior and a prominent horizontal form. The central section is flanked by two thick support legs, and the main body is divided into upper and lower compartments, separated by a glowing purple strip that suggests internal illumination or display functionality. On one side, a digital control panel or screen is mounted, featuring a grid of buttons and a blue-tinted interface, likely for user interaction or information display. The rear and side views reveal slanted, recessed panels with a coppery hue, adding depth and a sense of technological sophistication. The overall design is sleek and industrial, with clean lines and geometric surfaces, making it suitable for high-tech urban environments. The kiosk appears to be constructed primarily from metal, with integrated electronic components and illuminated elements.
description: A sleek, angular kiosk with a dark metallic body, glowing purple strip, and a digital control panel on one side. Its industrial design features geometric lines and illuminated accents.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main interface with a glowing purple strip and a digital control panel on the left side.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the slanted, recessed panels with coppery tones and the depth of the kiosk's structure.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front but without the control panel, highlighting the symmetry and illuminated central section.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the slanted panels and the supporting leg structure, with no visible control panel.
attribute_signage_type: digital display integrated on the left side, featuring a blue-tinted interface with text and grid-like elements
attribute_roof_design: flat, angular roof with geometric panels and no overhangs or decorative elements
